2606.26734.title: Robust Onion: Peeling Open Vocab Object Detectors Under Noise
2606.26734.paper_summary: The impact of real-world noise on Open Vocabulary Object Detectors (OV-ODs) remains poorly understood due to their architectural complexity. We present our comprehensive analysis Robust Onion, an empirical study that uses controlled synthetic visual degradations to peel OV-ODs layer-by-layer, revealing how, why, and where robustness degrades, systematically analyzing feature collapse. Our findings reveal that models with similar vision backbones exhibit comparable robustness, driven by similar feature collapse at similar layers, while factors such as pretraining strategy, architectural nuances, and caption supervision contribute little. Robustness is primarily governed by the image domain rather than annotations, explaining the similar robustness impact on COCO and LVIS, and why datasets like ODinW-13 can give an impression of inflated robustness due to large, isolated objects. Finally, we validate our insights by improving robustness on real-world BDD100K, WiderFace, and VisDRONE via our lightweight plug-and-play NN & TK0 approach, using 96x fewer trainable parameters than end-to-end training. We also explain the prior works' robustness observations.
2606.26734.paper_summary_zh: 現實世界噪音對開放詞彙物體檢測器（OV-ODs）的影響仍然不甚了解，這是由於其架構的複雜性。我們提出了我們的綜合分析 Robust Onion，這是一項實證研究，使用受控的合成視覺退化逐層剝離 OV-ODs，揭示了穩健性如何、為何以及在何處退化，並系統地分析特徵崩潰。我們的研究結果顯示，具有相似視覺骨幹的模型表現出可比較的穩健性，這是由於相似層次的特徵崩潰所驅動，而預訓練策略、架構細微差異和標註監督等因素貢獻不大。穩健性主要受圖像領域的支配，而非標註，這解釋了 COCO 和 LVIS 上相似的穩健性影響，以及為何像 ODinW-13 這樣的數據集可能給人一種膨脹穩健性的印象，因為它們包含大型孤立物體。最後，我們通過我們的輕量級即插即用 NN & TK0 方法，在真實世界的 BDD100K、WiderFace 和 VisDRONE 上提高了穩健性，使用的可訓練參數比端到端訓練少 96 倍。我們還解釋了先前工作的穩健性觀察結果。
2606.26734.author: Priyank Pathak et.al.
2606.26734.authors: Priyank Pathak, Mukilan Karuppasamy, Aaditya Baranwal, Shruti Vyas, Yogesh S Rawat
